tags.name: Melee
tags.description: *Melee* **Actions**  typically target only adjacent characters.

tags.name: Ranged
tags.description: **Effect:** *Ranged* actions are affected by cover and have **+1 Disadvantage** against adjacent characters.

tags.name: Spell
tags.description: *Spell* actions are magical in nature.

tags.name: Weapon
tags.description: **Effect:** *Weapon* **Actions** require an active *Stance* with the *Weapon* tag.*Ranged Weapon* **Actions** require an active *Stance* with the *Ranged Weapon* tag.

tags.name: Shield
tags.description: **Effect:** *Shield* actions require a **Stance** with the *Shield* tag.

tags.name: Stance
tags.description: *Stances* affect the types of actions your character can perform. You have all benefits of an active *Stance.*

tags.name: Special
tags.description: *Special* actions typically have unique restrictions or are granted by other actions.

tags.name: Heroic
tags.description: Under construction.

tags.name: Aura
tags.description: **Effect:** Your *Aura* affects a **Size 1 Area** centered on you.

tags.name: Movement
tags.description: **Effect:** You can't perform *Movement* **Actions** while **Immobilized**.

tags.name: Charged
tags.description: **Effect:** You can only peform a *Charged* **Action** while it has a charge; it loses its charge when used.

tags.name: Support
tags.description: *Support* **Actions** typically assist other characters.

tags.name: Reaction
tags.description: *Reactions* are typically performed on another character's turn.

tags.name: Attack
tags.description: **Effect:** *Attack* **Actions** require an **Attack Roll**.

tags.name: Summon
tags.description: *Summon* **Actions** typically summon characters under your control.

tags.name: Legendary
tags.description: **Effect:** You can't control more than one *Legendary Summon.*

tags.name: Passive
tags.description: *Passive* abilities have ongoing effects.

tags.name: Stealth
tags.description: *Stealth* **Actions** typically confer **Concealment**.

tags.name: Combo
tags.description: **Effect:** When you perform a *Combo* **Action**, until the end of your next turn, your next *Finisher* **Action** benefits from **Finisher** effects.

tags.name: Finisher
tags.description: **Effect:** This **Action** has additional *Finisher* properties if you performed a *Combo* **Action** since your last turn.

tags.name: Trap
tags.description: **Effect:** A *Trap* modifies a tile. Once armed, a *Trap* is *Triggered* when a character becomes adjacent during *Movement*.

tags.name: 1/Round
tags.description: **Effect:** Perform this **Action** only once per round, refreshing at the start of your second turn and on each of your subsequent turns. *Passive* and other special abilities with this property trigger or take effect no more than once per round.

tags.name: 1/Encounter
tags.description: **Effect:** **Actions** with this property can be performed only once per encounter. *Passive* and other special abilities with this property can only be used, trigger, or take effect once per encounter.

tags.name: Bound
tags.description: Bound Passives modify other Actions.

tags.name: Ultimate
tags.description: A character's ultimate ability.

tags.name: Accurate
tags.description: Accurate

tags.name: Inaccurate
tags.description: Inaccurate

tags.name: 1/Turn
tags.description: **Effect:** You can't perform this ability more than once during any character's turn; this ability can't take effect more than once per turn.

tags.name: Battered
tags.description: **Effect:** This ability can only be performed (or this passive only takes effect) while at half of your maximum HP or lower.

abilities.name: Guardian's Stance
abilities.description: You can perform *Shield* **Actions**. You have a **Block Rating** equal to 4+[tier].

abilities.name: Raise Shield
abilities.description: Until the start of your next turn, attacks against you have **+1 Disadvantage** and you have the **Block Reaction**.

abilities.name: Raise Shield: Block
abilities.description:
**Condition:** You are targeted by an **Attack** that gains **+1 Disadvantage** from **Raise Shield**.
**Effect:** Gain **Barrier** equal to your **Block Rating**. If you have no **Barrier** remaining after the attack, you can't use this *Reaction* for the rest of the encounter.

abilities.name: Entrenched
abilities.description: Hostile characters treat tiles adjacent to you as **Difficult Terrain**.

abilities.name: Shove
abilities.description:
Target hostile character makes a **Resistance Roll** or suffers **Push 2** and becomes **Prone.**
**Resist:** **Push 1**.

abilities.name: Ultimate: Absolute Defense
abilities.description: Clear **Prone.** Clear **Immobilized**. **Teleport** to a free space adjacent to an allied character. Until the start of your next turn, you and that character are **Invulnerable**.

abilities.name: Devotion Aura
abilities.description: Allied characters within your **Aura** have **+1 Advantage** on **Resistance Rolls**.

abilities.name: Defensive Reflexes
abilities.description: Perform a *Shield* **Action** that costs **1 AP** or less. You're **Stunned +1**. This **Condition** can't be prevented.

abilities.name: Pavise
abilities.description: Allied characters within your **Aura** can use you as **Cover**.

abilities.name: Shield Slam
abilities.description: **On Hit:** Target makes a **Resistance Roll** or becomes **Prone**.

abilities.name: Guardian
abilities.description:
**Condition:** An hostile character within **Range** of a  *Melee Attack* **Action** that costs **2 AP** or less performs an *Action* targeting a character other than you.
**Effect:** Perform that *Melee Attack* **Action** on the triggering character before the triggering **Action**.

abilities.name: Shield Charge
abilities.description:
Perform the *Basic* **Move Action**.
During this *Movement:* You can't change directions, have **Damage Resistance**, and ignore **Difficult Terrain**.
At the end of this *Movement:* Perform a *Melee Attack* **Action** that costs **1 AP** or less as a **Free Action**. It deals **+3 Bonus Damage**.

abilities.name: Shield Mastery
abilities.description: You have **Block Rating** +2.

abilities.name: Radiance
abilities.description:
Your *Aura* is a **Size 2 Area**, though characters outside your **Line of Effect** gain no benefits.
You also gain the **Prominence** *Special* **Action**.

abilities.name: Radiance: Prominence
abilities.description: Until the start of your next turn, your *Aura* is a **Size 3 Area**, though characters outside your **Line of Effect** gain no benefits.

abilities.name: Fortify
abilities.description: **End of Turn:** You may **Pay 1 Focus**. If you do, you're **Immobilized** 1. While **Immobilized** this way, you're **Immune to Involuntary Movement**. If you're in a *Shield Stance**, you also gain **Barrier** equal to your [tier].

abilities.name: Formation Fighting
abilities.description:
**Condition:** An allied character takes damage.
**Effect:** The damaged character may perform a *Basic* **Move Action** as a **Free Reaction**. This movement must move as far as possible towards you by the shortest available path.

abilities.name: Indefatigable
abilities.description: Whenever **Barrier, Damage Resistance, or Invulnerability** affects the amount of damage you take: Recover **1 Focus**.

abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.description: **Under Construction**.

abilities.name: Smite
abilities.description:
**Condition:** An allied character makes a successful attack against a hostile character adjacent to you.
**Effect - Focus Cost 2:** Choose one:
- The attack does [tier]+2 **Bonus Damage**.
- The attacker receives [tier]+2 **Healing**.

abilities.name: Rampart
abilities.description:
You create a **Rampart**, a line of five contiguous tiles where all five share an edge and the centermost is adjacent to you. It lasts until the end of your next turn. Your **Rampart** has the following properties:

- You and allied characters have **Damage Resistance** against attacks that draw **Line of Effect** through the **Rampart**.
- A hostile character that begins a turn in a tile adjacent to or occupied by the **Rampart** makes a **Resistance Roll** or is **Immobilized 1**. 
- You have **Maximum Speed: 1** and can't perform *Movement* **Actions** other than the *Basic* **Move Action**. *(The Rampart moves with you.)*

**Sustain** (0 AP): **Focus Cost 2**

abilities.name: Blessed Armor
abilities.description: The damage of the first successful *Attack* against you each round is reduced by 5 before all other forms of resistance and armor.

abilities.name: Shove
abilities.description:
Target hostile character makes a **Resistance Roll** or suffers **Push 2** and becomes **Prone.**
**Resist:** **Push 1**.

abilities.name: Toughness
abilities.description: **Passive:** +2 Maximum HP.

abilities.name: Shield Stance
abilities.description: You can perform *Shield* **Actions**. You have a **Block Rating** equal to 4+[tier] and the **Raise Shield** *Special* **Action**.

abilities.name: Grapple
abilities.description:
**On Hit**: You are **Grappling**, and the target is **Restrained**. *(They're special Statuses that exist in a pair.)*
- The **Grappling** character can't perform **Grapple**, and can't perform more than one *Movement* **Action** in a turn. That character can clear this status as a **Free Action**.
- The **Restrained** character is **Immobilized** and mirrors the **Grappling** character's movement as involuntary movement. That character has (**1AP**) **Resistance Roll (10):** Clear the status.
The status is cleared any time the characters are no longer adjacent, either character is reduced to 0 HP, or there is a difference in elevation between the characters.

abilities.name: Stampede
abilities.description:
You can attempt to move into a hostile character's space. When you do, that character makes a **Resistance Roll**. If the character **Resists**, your *Movement* ends. Otherwise, you move into that space, but can't end your turn there.
A **Prone** character automatically fails the **Resistance Roll**.

abilities.name: Improved Toughness
abilities.description: **Passive:** +4 Maximum HP.

abilities.name: Armor Mastery
abilities.description: **Passive:** +1 Armor *(max. 2)*

abilities.name: Warding
abilities.description: **Passive:** You have **+1 Advantage** on **Resistance Rolls**.

abilities.name: Gladiator Stance
abilities.description: *Non-Spell* **Action** **Focus Cost -1** *(min. 1).*

abilities.name: Ranged Stance
abilities.description: In **Ranged Stance**, you can perform *Ranged Weapon Attack* **Actions**. Your *Basic* **Attack Action** is *Ranged* and has **Range 4**.

abilities.name: Shield Stance
abilities.description: You can perform *Shield* **Actions**. You have a **Block Rating** equal to 4+[tier] and the **Raise Shield** *Special* **Action**.

abilities.name: Rearm
abilities.description:
Change an active *Stance* to another *Stance* available to you.
Then, you may perform a *Weapon, Ranged Weapon, or Shield* **Action** that shares a tag with your current **Stance**.
That **Action's AP Cost** is reduced by 1 *(min. 1).*

abilities.name: Ultimate: Unstoppable
abilities.description:
Gain **1 AP**. It can't be spent on *Spell* **Actions**. Gain **Barrier** ***x***, where ***x*** is half your maximum HP. This **Barrier** isn't lost as turns end. Clear **Prone.** Clear any number of **Conditions** of your choice. For each adjacent character, choose: that character falls **Prone** or suffers **Push 1**.
**For the rest of the encounter:** You can perform an additional **Reaction** during each character's turn, and you have **Start of Turn:** Gain **1 AP**. It can't be spent on *Spell* **Actions**.

abilities.name: Second Wind
abilities.description:
**Passive:** Increased **Focus Pool (+1)**.

**1/Encounter:** When you **Refocus**, apply **Healing** to yourself equal to half your maximum HP.

abilities.name: Focus Attack
abilities.description:
**Flurry**

**+1 Advantage**

abilities.name: Mighty Attack
abilities.description:
**Bind** to a *non-Spell Attack* **Action**.
The **Bound** *Attack* has **+1 Disadvantage** and **+1 Bonus Damage**. When dealing damage with the **Bound** *Attack*, roll all damage dice twice and use the highest results.

abilities.name: Shield Stagger
abilities.description: **While you're in a** *Shield* **Stance:** **1/Turn** when an adjacent hostile character damages your **Barrier**, that character suffers **Push 1** and **Off Guard**.

abilities.name: Attack of Opportunity
abilities.description:
**Condition:** An hostile character within **Range** of a  *Melee Attack* **Action** that costs **2 AP** or less performs a *Movement* **Action**.
**Effect:** Perform that *Melee Attack* **Action** on the triggering character before the triggering **Action**.

abilities.name: Bash
abilities.description: **On Attack:** If the target is **Slowed, Prone, or Immobilized**, Bash has **+1 Advantage** and deals **+3 Bonus Damage** on a hit.

abilities.name: Duelist's Parry
abilities.description:
Perform this **Action** only while in a non-*Shield Stance*.
Until the start of your next turn, you have **DEF +1**.

abilities.name: Battle Charge
abilities.description:
Move up to twice your **Speed**.
During this *Movement:* You can't change directions, have **Damage Resistance**, and ignore **Difficult Terrain**.
At the end of this *Movement:* Adjacent hostile characters are **Slowed 1**. *(No roll.)*

abilities.name: Battle High
abilities.description: You may **Recover 1 Focus** on a hit with a *Basic Melee* **Attack Action**.

abilities.name: Sunder
abilities.description: Your next **Attack Action** has **On Hit:** Target makes a **Resistance Roll** or becomes **Sundered 1**.

abilities.name: Shockwave
abilities.description:
Characters in a **Cleave 3** area make a **Resistance Roll** or suffer 2[A]+3 **DMG** and fall **Prone,** or become **Immobilized 1** if already **Prone.**
A character that **Resists** suffers half damage and isn't **Prone** or **Immobilized.**

abilities.name: Indomitable
abilities.description:
**Condition:** You fail a **Resistance Roll.**

**Effect - Focus Cost 2:** Reroll that **Resistance Roll** and use the new result.

abilities.name: Engagement
abilities.description:
Your *Basic* **Attack Action** has **On Hit**: The target is **Marked** by your **Engagement**, and other characters **Marked** this way are no longer **Marked**.

**1/Round** as a **Free Action**: **Move** 2 as close as possible to the character **Marked** by **Engagement**. This **Free Action** ignores **Difficult Terrain** and doesn�t trigger hostile **Reactions**.

abilities.name: Onslaught
abilities.description: Perform the *Basic* **Attack Action** with **Flurry** as a **Free Action** four times.

abilities.name: Demolisher's Art
abilities.description: You gain one use of the **Craterize** *Special* **Action.** Until you perform **Craterize,** you can't perform other *Weapon* or *Attack* **Actions** and can't perform more than one *Movement* **Action** each turn.

abilities.name: Demolisher's Art: Craterize
abilities.description:
Perform **Craterize** only during a **Delayed Turn** and only with **Initiative.**

- **On Attack:** Characters adjacent to the target make a **Resistance Roll** or suffer the attack's full damage, or half damage on a **Resist**.
- Each character damaged by **Craterize** becomes **Prone**, or **Immobilized 1** if already **Prone**.

abilities.name: Shadowbringer
abilities.description:
Roll **1d6**. You take that much **Piercing Chaos Damage**.
The first *Attack* you make as part of any *Attack* **Action** this turn deals that much **Bonus Damage** on a hit.

abilities.name: Taunt
abilities.description:
Target hostile character is **Taunted 1**.
*(+1 Disadvantage on Attack Rolls against characters other than you as long as you're not Staggered, Invulnerable, or otherwise untargetable.)*

abilities.name: Grit
abilities.description:
While **Battered**, you have **Damage Resistance**.

**1/Encounter:** The first time **Shadowbringer** would bring you to 0 or less HP, your HP becomes your **Battered** threshold.

abilities.name: Ultimate: Call of the Void
abilities.description:
**Condition:** Damage dealt by a hostile character would reduce your **HP** to 0 or less.
**Effect:** Gain **Exmortis**. *(It's a special Status.)*
**Exmortis** has the following effect: You regenerate **Turn AP** and can perform **Actions** normally while at 0 or less HP. You have **+1 Advantage** on all **Action Resolutions**. Characters can't **Aid** you, and you can't gain HP in any way. If you would take any amount of damage, ignore that damage and become **Stunned +1**.
If you're **Stunned 3** or greater at the start of your turn, **Exmortis** ends and your **HP** becomes 1 if it's less than 1.

abilities.name: Bloodletting
abilities.description: You suffer **Piercing Chaos Damage** equal to the number of **Conditions** affecting you that aren't self-inflicted.Then, choose one of those **Conditions** and make a **Resistance Roll** (10). On a **Resist,** clear that **Condition.**

abilities.name: Mocking Blow
abilities.description:
**Flurry**
**On Hit:** Target makes a **Resistance Roll** or becomes **Taunted 1.**

abilities.name: The Greatest Teacher
abilities.description:
**Condition:** A hostile character within the range of your *Basic* **Study Action** deals damage to you or an allied character adjacent to you.
**Effect:** Perform the *Basic* **Study Action** against the triggering character as part of this **Reaction.**

abilities.name: Crisis Core
abilities.description: **While Battered:** The first *Attack* you make as part of each *Attack* **Action** you perform deals **+2** **Bonus Damage** on a hit.

abilities.name: Fight or Flight
abilities.description: **While Battered:** You have **+1 Speed.**

abilities.name: Heavy Stance
abilities.description: You have **+1 Attack** and **All In**.

abilities.name: Revenge
abilities.description:
**Condition:** A hostile character within the **Range** of an available *Melee Attack* **Action** inflicts a harmful **Condition** on you.
**Effect:** Perform that *Melee Attack* **Action** on the triggering character before the **Condition** is inflicted.

abilities.name: Hatred
abilities.description:
**Until the end of your next turn:** Hostile characters within your **Aura** have **+1 Disadvantage** on **Resistance Rolls.**
**Sustain - Focus Cost:** 1

abilities.name: Menace
abilities.description: **Taunted** you apply doesn't Decay on a character unless that character targets you or forces you to make a **Resistance Roll** with any **Action** during their turn.

abilities.name: Eye for an Eye
abilities.description: When you take damage from a hostile character, recover 1 **Focus**.

abilities.name: Scraps of Life
abilities.description:
**Condition:** An adjacent allied character takes damage.
**Effect:** Prevent that damage. You take that much **Piercing Chaos Damage.**

abilities.name: Intimidation Tactics
abilities.description: Your *Attack* **Actions** have **+1 Advantage** against **Taunted, Poisoned,** or **Bleeding** characters.

abilities.name: Conjure Reflection
abilities.description:
Conjure **Reflection** in an adjacent free tile. **Reflection** is **Legendary,** can perform *Basic* **Move** and **Attack Actions** using your **AP**, and doesn't provoke **Reactions.**

**Reflection** (**ATK** d6, **MAG** d6, **HP** N/A, **DEF** Yours, **SPD** Yours, **FP** 0) **1/Round**: When you inflict a **Condition** on a hostile character: **Reflection** performs an **Action** that costs **1 AP** or less as a **Free Action**.

If **Reflection** would take damage, instead, you take that damage. **Reflection** is removed from play when you become **Downed.** **Reflection** is **Invulnerable** to sources of damage that affect multiple characters.

abilities.name: Enchainment
abilities.description:
Target any number of hostile characters. 

**For each target beyond the first:** **Focus Cost: +1**.
- **On Hit:** The target is **Pulled** as close to you as possible.

abilities.name: Frightening Aspersion
abilities.description:
When you inflict **Taunted, Poisoned,** or **Bleeding** to a hostile character, also inflict **Stunned +1.**
Each hostile character can only be **Stunned** by **Frightening Aspersion** once per encounter.

abilities.name: Attack
abilities.description: *(During your turn, Attack **Actions** have **+1 Disadvantage** for each other Attack **Action** performed this turn. An Attack **Action** with the **Flurry** property is exempt from this characteristic.)*

abilities.name: Move
abilities.description: **Choose one:** **Move** **Speed**, or clear **Prone**.

abilities.name: Aid
abilities.description:
While you are adjacent to an allied character, you can **Aid** that character. **Choose one:**
- **Describe how you aid that character. At the GM's discretion: **Make an **Action Resolution** (DV 10). If you succeed, that character's next **Action Resolution** that benefits from your aid **during their next turn** has **+1 Advantage.** *(This effect does not stack with repeated uses of the Aid action from a single character or with Aid actions from multiple characters.)*
- That character may clear **Prone** as a **Reaction**.
- That character clears **Staggered.**

abilities.name: Study
abilities.description:
Target a character within **Range 4.** Choose one of the following:
� You learn that character's remaining HP and defenses.
� You learn the character's attacks and abilities.
� At the GM's discretion, you learn a piece of useful information about the character.

abilities.name: Evade
abilities.description: **Move 1. **Performing **Evade** doesn't trigger hostile **Reactions.**

abilities.name: Refocus
abilities.description: Recover one third of your maximum **Focus.** Clear **Off Guard.**

abilities.name: Deadly
abilities.description: **Each round,** your first hit with a *Weapon Attack* **Action** deals **+2 Bonus Damage** to one target.

abilities.name: Flanking
abilities.description:
You have **+1 Advantage** on *Melee Attack Actions* against a character you are *Flanking*.
*(You are Flanking a character if you and an allied character are in melee range of, and on opposite sides of that character. A line drawn from the center of your tile to the center of the ally's tile must pass through opposite corners or sides of the flanked character's tile. It's a special Status.)*

abilities.name: Assault
abilities.description:
**Bind** to a *non-Basic Attack* **Action**. *( When you begin a Quest, choose an option from those available to you to bind this ability to. )*
The **Bound** *Attack* is a **Combo Action** with **Focus Cost +1.**

abilities.name: Battle Stance
abilities.description: You have **+1 Attack**.

abilities.name: Staggering Blow
abilities.description:
**Bind** to a *non-Basic Attack* **Action**. *( When you begin a Quest, choose an option from those available to you to bind this ability to. )*
The **Bound** *Attack* has **Finisher:** +3 **Bonus Damage.** The target makes a **Resistance Roll** or becomes **Prone.**

abilities.name: Fool's Gambit
abilities.description: **This turn**, your next non-*Basic,* non-*Finisher* *Weapon Attack* **Action** is a *Combo* **Action** and costs 1 AP less *(min. 0)*.

abilities.name: Sneak
abilities.description:
Perform **Sneak** only if you're not adjacent to any hostile characters, and only while adjacent to cover or terrain that grants cover.
You gain **Concealment 3.** It lasts until you take damage or perform any **Action** or **Reaction.**

abilities.name: Fleetfoot
abilities.description: **+1 Speed.**

abilities.name: True Charge
abilities.description:
When you **Delay**, you may initiate a **True Charge,** which has the following properties:
- Until your **Delayed** turn begins, if you would take any amount of damage from a single source, you may gain **Damage Resistance** against that damage. Activate this effect only once per **True Charge.**
- At the beginning of your **Delayed** turn, you may perform the *Basic* **Evade Action** as a **Free Action**.
- The first *Melee Attack* **Action** you perform during your **Delayed** turn deals **+2 Bonus Damage** on a hit.

abilities.name: Draw Strike
abilities.description: Your *Melee Weapon Attack* **Actions** have **Initiative:** The **Attack Roll** has **+1 Advantage.** *( An Action activates its Initiative effects if it's your turn and your first AP is spent on that Action. )*

abilities.name: Phasing
abilities.description: During *Movement*, you can move through hostile characters. You still provoke Reactions.

abilities.name: Final Judgment
abilities.description:
Perform **Final Judgement** only during a **Delayed** turn.

As part of this **Action,** perform a *Basic Melee Attack* **Action** against any number of characters within **Range 12**, as long as an unobstructed path of any distance exists through which you could move to that character. These attacks can't be prevented and don't trigger **Reactions.** Attacks made this way have **Flurry,** **+1 Advantage,** and **On Hit:** **+3 Bonus Damage**. Each character targeted this way can only be hit by one successful attack.

You **Teleport** to a free tile within **Range 12.**

abilities.name: Wind Dance
abilities.description: When your *Weapon Attack* **Action** misses all targets: **Focus Cost 1** - Repeat the missed *Attack* **Action** as a **Free Action**.

abilities.name: Whirlwind Strike
abilities.description: Perform the **Attack Roll** against all hostile characters within **Range**.

abilities.name: Hidden Step
abilities.description: Perform a *Basic Evade* **Action**. You're **Stunned +1**--it can't be prevented.

abilities.name: True Strike
abilities.description: The first **Attack Roll** you make for the first *Weapon Attack* **Action** you perform during each of your turns has **+1 Advantage**.

abilities.name: Heavy Stance
abilities.description: You have **+1 Attack** and **All In**.

abilities.name: Parry
abilities.description:
**Condition:** A hostile character would deal non-**Piercing** damage to you.
**Effect:** Gain [Attack] **Barrier**, which can reduce the triggering damage. If this **Barrier** is depleted by damage, you are **Stunned +1.**

abilities.name: Savage Edge
abilities.description:
Your next *Weapon Attack* **Action** this turn has the following property:
**On Attack:** Up to one target makes a **Resistance Roll** or suffers **Bleeding 3**.
The character suffers **Bleeding +1** on a **Resist**.

abilities.name: Flicker Step
abilities.description: Teleport to a free space.

abilities.name: Versatile Stance
abilities.description:
**When you enter this Stance, choose one:**
- Gain **Barrier 3.** This **Barrier** isn't lost as turns end.
- Your next attack deals **+3 Bonus Damage.**
- You gain **+3 Focus,** exceeding the maximum in your Focus Pool.

abilities.name: Hunter's Mark
abilities.description:
**Condition:** A hostile character performs any **Action** while you have no Marked enemy.
**Effect:** Mark the triggering character. When a Marked character is reduced to 0 HP or removed from the encounter, recover 2 **Focus.** While a character is marked, you have **Change Target.**

abilities.name: Hunter's Mark: Change Target
abilities.description: Change your Marked character to target hostile character.

abilities.name: Kip Up
abilities.description: Clear **Prone**.

abilities.name: Divine Deflection
abilities.description:
**Condition:** You are hit by a *Ranged Attack.*
**Effect:** Make a **Resistance Roll** (11). On a **4+:** You have **Damage Resistance** against the triggering attack, and that attack has: "**On Hit:** The attacker **repeats** the attack against themselves."

abilities.name: Sweeping Strikes
abilities.description: In **Versatile Stance** or **Heavy Stance**: Your first *Melee Weapon Attack* **Action** each turn has **Cleave 2**.

abilities.name: Omnislash
abilities.description:
**Flurry**
Perform a *Basic* **Move Action** as a **Free Action**. During this *Movement,* you are **Flying** and don't trigger **Reactions.** At the end of the movement, **Omnislash's Attack Roll** targets any number of characters, as long as you were adjacent to each targeted character at any point during this *Movement*.

abilities.name: Swallow Cutter
abilities.description:
**1/Round:** When your *Melee Attack's* **Attack Roll** has **net Advantage,** you may instead make that attack with no net **Advantage** or **Disadvantage.**
**If you do,** perform a *Melee Attack* **Action** that costs 1 AP or less as a **Free Action**.

abilities.name: Trick Stance
abilities.description: When you perform an *Attack* **Action** against a hostile character that's adjacent to one or more of your allies: The **Attack Roll** has **+1 Advantage.**

abilities.name: Skirmisher
abilities.description: You can move diagonally.

abilities.name: Shadow Walk
abilities.description:
Perform **Shadow Walk** only if you're not adjacent to any hostile characters, and only while adjacent to cover or a source of cover.
You have the **Hide Reaction** until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Shadow Walk: Hide
abilities.description:
**Condition:** A hostile character begins their turn, and you used **Shadow Walk** on your most recent turn.
**Effect:** The character makes a **Resistance Roll**. A character that fails can't target you with **Actions** this turn unless those **Actions** could target multiple characters.

abilities.name: Eviscerate
abilities.description:
Perform **Eviscerate** only against a target that is not adjacent to any of its allies.

**On Miss:** Refund **Eviscerate's Inspiration Cost** and **1/Quest** property.

**Finisher: Eviscerate** has the following properties:
- The **Attack Roll** has +1 **Advantage.**
- **On Hit:** The target is **Sundered** until the end of their next turn.

Then, **Move** or **Evade** as a **Free Action**.

abilities.name: Lightfoot
