abilities.name: Combined Offensive
abilities.description:
You may perform **Combined Offensive** with **1, 2, or 3 AP**. When you perform **Combined Offensive**, choose *Weapon* or *Spell.* Then, perform a corresponding *Attack* **Action** with an **AP Cost** less than or equal to the amount used to perform **Combined Offensive.**

**Then,** perform a *Weapon* **Action** (if you chose *Spell*) or *Spell* **Action** (if you chose *Weapon*) *that* costs **1 AP** as a **Free Action**. You pay all other costs for this **Action.** If this **Action** is also an *Attack*, it must target the same character as the previous **Action.**

abilities.name: Tactician's Stance
abilities.description: *Support Spell* **Focus Cost -1.**

abilities.name: Grand Strategy
abilities.description:
Hostile characters in a **Size 3 Area** centered on you become **Off Guard.** **For the rest of the encounter, you have the following properties:**

- When performing an **Action** reduces you to 0 **Focus,** recover 2 **Focus.**

- Whenever you perform a *Spell* **Action** or the *Basic* **Study Action**, you or an allied character of your choice within **Range** 12 can perform a *Basic* **Evade Action** as a **Free Reaction**.

- **Start of Turn:** You may perform the *Basic* **Study Action** as a **Free Action**.

abilities.name: Counterspell
abilities.description:
**Condition:** A hostile character within **Range 6** performs a *Spell* **Action.**

**Effect** - **Spend 1 Inspiration:** Prevent that action. You gain [tier] **Focus.** *(The action is treated as if it had no effects. Costs are still paid. If the action was a charged ability, it's no longer charged.)*

abilities.name: Magic Shield
abilities.description: You have a **Block Rating** equal to [tier]+4. Your *Shield* **Actions** are *Spell* **Actions**, using the higher value between [atk] and [mag] where applicable. During encounters, your active *Stance* gains the *Shield* tag. Whenever you perform a *Shield* **Action,** you gain the **Ward Reaction** until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Magic Shield: Ward
abilities.description:
**Condition**: You are targeted by an *Attack* that would deal 1 or more damage.

**Effect - Focus Cost 1:** Gain **Barrier** equal to your **Block Rating.** If you have no **Barrier** remaining after damage is dealt, you are **Stunned +1.**

abilities.name: War Caster
abilities.description: If you would perform an *Attack* **Action** as a **Reaction,** you may perform a *Spell* **Action** that could target the triggering character instead, and you may **Spend 1 Inspiration** rather than paying the **Focus Cost** for this *Spell* **Action.**

abilities.name: Contingency
abilities.description: **Spend 1 Inspiration:** Choose an available *Spell* **Action.** You pay its **Focus Cost** and its **AP Cost** reduced by **1 AP** *(min. 1).* Create a **Glyph of Warding**, a *Trap* which stores that spell, in a free tile within **Range 6**. Starting at the beginning of your next turn, you have the **Activate Contingency** Reaction while the Glyph exists.

abilities.name: Contingency: Activate
abilities.description:
**Condition:** An eligible target of the chosen spell moves onto or becomes adjacent to your **Glyph** or begins their turn on or adjacent to your **Glyph.**

**Effect:** The triggering character triggers your **Glyph.** Destroy the **Glyph** and perform that *Spell* **Action** on the triggering character as a **Reaction** with no **Focus** cost. If it has a range profile, the range profile is drawn from the **Glyph's** tile.

abilities.name: Fianchetto
abilities.description: When a hostile character's effect causes you to move, including by forcing you to perform a *Movement* **Action**: You may **Move** 1 before or after that movement. While moving this way, you can move diagonally, don't trigger hostile reactions, and ignore difficult terrain.

abilities.name: Disciplined Tactician
abilities.description:
Increased **Focus Pool** (+1).

When you **Refocus**, you may **Study** as a **Free Action**.

abilities.name: Rune Edge
abilities.description:
All characters in the **Cleave** become targets.

As you perform **Rune Edge**, you choose if it's a *Weapon* or *Spell* **Action**, both, or neither.

abilities.name: Spell Pierce
abilities.description: During your turn, the first *Spell Attack* **Action** you perform has **+1 Advantage** against targets that aren't In cover.

abilities.name: Embolden
abilities.description:
Perform the *Basic* **Aid Action** on an allied character within **Range** as part of this **Action**. You can always choose to give that character **Advantage** when performing **Aid** this way, though you still have to make an **Action Resolution.**

That character also receives **1 Healing.**

abilities.name: Shock
abilities.description:
**Flurry**

**On Hit:** The target makes a **Resistance Roll** or is **Stunned +1.**

abilities.name: Imperial Eye
abilities.description: When you Study a hostile character, that character gains **Imperial Eye**; it's a special **Condition**. An *Attack* that hits a character clears **Imperial Eye** on that character and deals [t]+1 **Bonus Damage**.

abilities.name: Absorb
abilities.description: You or up to one allied character within **Range** gains **Barrier** [mag]. This **Barrier** isn't lost as turns end.

abilities.name: Celerity
abilities.description:
You or up to one adjacent allied character gain **Haste:** At the beginning of your turn, gain **1 AP**.

**Haste** lasts until the end of the encounter, or until the affected character ends a turn with no AP remaining. *(It's a special Status.)*

abilities.name: Divine Eye
abilities.description: **1/Round**: When you **Study** a hostile character, that character becomes **Off Guard.**

abilities.name: Mind Palace
abilities.description: **At the end of your turn:** If you performed the *Basic* **Study Action** and dealt no damage to hostile characters, **recover 2 Focus.**

abilities.name: Freedom of Movement
abilities.description:
You or an adjacent allied character gains **Freedom of Movement** until the end of your next turn. The character ignores **Difficult Terrain** and is immune to **Slowed, Stunned,** and **Immobilized.**

**Sustain** - **Focus Cost: 1** *( Each active instance must be Sustained separately. Freedom of Movement is a special Status. )*

abilities.name: Nova
abilities.description: All characters in **Range** become targets.

abilities.name: Might and Magic
abilities.description:
When you perform a *Weapon Attack* **Action,** your next *Spell Attack* **Action** has **+1 Advantage** and deals **+2 Bonus Damage.** *( Does not stack. )*

When you perform a *Spell Attack* **Action,** your next *Weapon Attack* **Action** has **+1 Advantage** and deals **+2 Bonus Damage.** *( Does not stack. )*

abilities.name: Visual Calculus
abilities.description:
Create **Visual Calculus.** It's a **Size 1 Area** centered on target tile.

**For the rest of the encounter:** Hostile characters in the area are **Sundered** and can't perform *Stealth* **Actions** or benefit from **Concealment.**

You have **1 AP:** Move **Visual Calculus** to target tile within **Range** 5.

abilities.name: Elemental Shift
abilities.description:
**Start of Encounter:** Choose a terrain type to associate with your **Elemental Shift.**
- **Fire** — A character that ends their turn in Fire suffers 1d6 Piercing Damage.
- **Water** — Water is **Difficult Terrain.**
- **Air** — Characters in the area have **Concealment 2.**

When you perform the *Basic* **Refocus Action,** you may choose a different terrain type.

abilities.name: Terrain Transmutation
abilities.description: Choose a **Size 1 Area** centered on target tile. For the rest of the encounter or until you perform this **Action** again, that area becomes the terrain type associated with your **Elemental Shift.**

abilities.name: Stable
abilities.description: Your movement ignores **Difficult Terrain.**

abilities.name: Ultimate: Alchemical Eruption
abilities.description:
Choose three **Size 1 Areas** or one **Size 2 Area** centered on tiles within **Range 12.** The areas can't overlap. Each chosen area becomes a terrain type of your choice from among those available to your **Elemental Shift.**

For the rest of the encounter, as you perform **Terrain Transmutation,** you may change the type associated with your **Elemental Shift.** Additionally, your **Elemental Shift** has access to the following special terrain types:

- **Orichalcum:** A character that begins a turn in Orichalcum gains **1 AP.**
- **Acid:** A character in Acid is **Sundered.**
- **Ice:** A character that enters the terrain from any direction during a non-Teleport Movement ends that Movement, loses all remaining Movement from that action or effect, then suffers involuntary movement in that direction until they are no longer on an Ice tile or they collide. This involuntary movement doesn't trigger Traps or other abilities.

abilities.name: Cloudkill
abilities.description:
The **Area** created by **Rolling Amber** is **Difficult Terrain** and its edge blocks **Line of Effect.** *(Range can't be drawn through it, into it from outside, or outside of it from inside.)*

When you perform **Rolling Amber, Spend 1 Inspiration:** Characters in the area make an additional **Resistance Roll** against the **Action's** effect immediately. *(As if they'd just begun their turns.)*

abilities.name: Adept of Motion
abilities.description: If you would **Push** or **Pull** a character, instead, you move that character that far in any direction.  You have **Teleport Ally**.

abilities.name: Adept of Motion: Teleport Ally
abilities.description: **1/Encounter — Spend 1 Inspiration:** Teleport yourself or an allied character within **Range** to a target free tile within **Range.**

abilities.name: Spikes
abilities.description: When a character becomes affected by **Difficult Terrain** you created: That character suffers **3 Piercing Damage.** A character can only take this damage **1/Round.** *(No roll. A character becomes affected by Difficult Terrain when it causes them to spend additional movement.)*

abilities.name: Master Controller
abilities.description: During each of your turns, the first *Spell* **Action** you perform that targets a tile or space has **AP Cost -1** *(min. 1)*.

abilities.name: Master of Boundaries
abilities.description: **Create Wall** targets a fourth tile. Objects you create have **+2 HP.** You have **Master of Boundaries: Create**.

abilities.name: Master of Boundaries: Create
abilities.description: **1/Encounter:** Create a **Wall** in a target free tile within **Range.** It's a **Destructible Obstruction** with [tier]+8 HP and **Elevation 3.**

abilities.name: Mold Earth
abilities.description:
Choose one:
- For the rest of the encounter, target free tile becomes **Difficult Terrain.**
- For the rest of the encounter, target tile that's **Difficult Terrain** becomes normal terrain.

abilities.name: Explosive Runes
abilities.description: When a hostile character triggers your **Trap:** That character suffers **3 Damage.** *(No roll.)*

abilities.name: Outmaneuver
abilities.description: Each turn, your first **Attack Action** has **+1 Advantage** against targets in **Difficult Terrain.**

abilities.name: Elemental Seal
abilities.description:
Perform **Elemental Seal** only while you have fewer than [tier]+1 **Elemental Seals** in play.

An **Elemental Seal** is armed at the start of your next turn and activates when a hostile character becomes adjacent while armed.

**Effect:** The **Trap** detonates in a **Size 1 Area.** Characters in that area make a **Resistance Roll,** suffering **2[mag] Damage** and becoming **Slowed 1.** A character that **Resists** suffers half damage and isn't slowed.

abilities.name: Elemental Sparks
abilities.description:
**+1 Advantage**

Target up to three characters. *(Make a separate Attack Roll for each.)*

**On Damage:** The target character suffers **Push 1.**

abilities.name: Levitate
abilities.description: You or an adjacent allied character is **Flying** during voluntary Movement until the end of that character's next turn.

abilities.name: Kinesis
abilities.description:
Target hostile character in **Range** makes a **Resistance Roll** or suffers **Push 2** and becomes **Prone.**

**Resist:** **Push 1.**

A **Prone** character always **Resists Kinesis.**

abilities.name: Phantom Tether
abilities.description:
**Flurry**

**On Hit:** Until the start of your next turn, if the target performs a **Movement Action** and moves closer to you, that character suffers **[mag]+4 Damage.** *(No roll.)*

abilities.name: Create Wall
abilities.description: Target three free contiguous tiles, where each tile shares an edge with the previous tile. Create **Walls,** **Destructible Obstructions** with [tier]+8 HP in those tiles. Tiles obstructed this way have **Elevation 3.**

abilities.name: Gravity Well
abilities.description:
Characters in a **Size 2 Area** centered on the target tile make a **Resistance Roll.**

A character that fails the **Resistance Roll** is **Teleported** as close to the center of the area as possible. *(You choose the order in which characters are moved.)*

abilities.name: Sacred Geometry
abilities.description: At the end of your turn, if you are adjacent to exactly two obstructed tiles: **Recover 2 Focus.**

abilities.name: Rolling Amber
abilities.description:
Create **Rolling Amber,** a **Size 1 Area** centered on target tile. It lasts until the end of your next turn.

When a character begins their turn in the area or moves into the area for the first time during their turn: That character makes a **Resistance Roll** or suffers **1d6+[tier] Damage,** or half on a **Resist.** If the character triggered this effect by moving into the area, that movement ends and remaining movement from that effect is lost.

**(1ap) Sustain — Focus Cost: 1:** You may move the area one tile in any direction.

abilities.name: Erupting Earth
abilities.description: For the rest of the encounter: You have the **Stalagmite** Reaction.

abilities.name: Erupting Earth: Stalagmite
abilities.description:
**2/Encounter — Condition:** A hostile character attempts to move into a free tile within **Range 2.**

**Effect:** Create a **Wall,** a **Destructible Obstruction** with [tier]+8 HP in that tile. A tile obstructed this way has **Elevation 3.** The triggering movement is prevented, and any movement remaining from that effect is lost.

abilities.name: Reflecting Pool
abilities.description:
Create a **Reflecting Pool,** a **Size 1 Area** centered on target tile. It lasts for the rest of the encounter.

While in a **Reflecting Pool,** allied characters have:

**(1 AP) - 1/Round:** Perform the last non-Ultimate, non-Summon, non-Reflecting Pool **Action** you performed. It's a **Free Action (0ap)** with **Focus Cost 0** that deals half damage, deals no bonus damage, and can't generate AP or reduce AP Costs. It has **Flurry** if it's an **Attack** and is considered to be charged if it's a **Charged** ability. Any **Inspiration Cost** must still be paid. Usage limits are ignored. *(Such as x/turn, x/round, or x/encounter.)*

abilities.name: Crystal of Light
abilities.description:
Conjure a **Crystal of Light** in an adjacent empty tile. A **Crystal of Light** can **Move** using your AP. The **Crystal of Light** Teleports when making voluntary movement.

Damage dealt to a **Crystal of Light** is reduced to 1 and dealt as Piercing Chaos Damage. A **Crystal of Light** can't be Healed.

**ATK:** 0 | **MAG:** 0 | **HP:** [tier]+3 | **DEF:** 8 | **SPD:** 4 | **FP:** 0

A **Crystal of Light** is **Legendary.** While adjacent to a **Crystal of Light,** you and allied characters have the **Refraction** Reaction. *(You can't control more than one Legendary Summon.)*

abilities.name: Crystal of Light: Refraction
abilities.description:
**1/Turn — Condition:** You become the target of a **Ranged Action** that targets only one character.

**Effect:** Change the target of that **Action** to a character of your choice within **Range 4** of the **Crystal of Light.** The **Crystal of Light** takes **1 Piercing Chaos Damage.**

abilities.name: Dimensional Bolt
abilities.description:
**Flurry**

**On Hit:** Until the start of your next turn, if your **Summon** would deal damage to the target, it deals [tier] **Bonus Damage.**

abilities.name: The Art
abilities.description:
You may perform **The Art** with **1, 2, or 3 AP.** When you perform **The Art**, perform any available **Action** that costs **AP** less than or equal to the amount used to perform **The Art.**

Then, one **Summon** you control performs an available **Action** that costs **1 AP** as a **Free Action.**

abilities.name: Reposition Summon
abilities.description: While moving, if you would **Collide** with your **Summon** or enter its tile from an adjacent tile, you may instead switch places with it.

abilities.name: Ultimate: The Communion
abilities.description: For the rest of the encounter: You may perform **Attack** and **Spell Actions** as though you were in the same tile as any **Summon** you control. Additionally, you have **Death Erasure.**

abilities.name: Death Erasure
abilities.description:
**1/Round — Condition:** You or an allied character within **Range 5** would fail a **Resistance Roll,** take any amount of damage, or die.

**Effect:** Sacrifice a **Summon.** If you do, ignore the effect that triggered **Death Erasure** and reduce any incoming damage to 0.

abilities.name: Master Summoner
abilities.description:
You can control two **Legendary Summons,** as long as you control no other **Summons** and they aren't two of the same **Legendary Summon.**

Your **Summons** can move diagonally. The first time you **Conjure** a **Legendary Summon** each encounter, if it's your turn, gain **(1ap).**

**1/Quest:** When you **Conjure** a **Legendary Summon, Spend 1 Inspiration:** That **Legendary Summon** gains **Focus Pool 6** (max. 6), has all non-Summon, non-Basic **Spell Actions** available to you, and can perform them using your AP. It also has **Start of Turn:** Recover 1 Focus.

abilities.name: The Abyss
abilities.description: When your **Summon** dies, adjacent characters make a **Resistance Roll.** On a failure, those characters take **2[mag] Damage.** A character that **Resists** takes half as much damage.

abilities.name: The Abyss: Seethe
abilities.description: **Spend 1 Inspiration:** Characters adjacent to one or more of your **Summons** make a **Resistance Roll** or take **2[mag] Damage.** A character that **Resists** takes half as much damage.

abilities.name: The Ritual
abilities.description: **1/Round,** when you **Sacrifice** a **Summon** during your turn, **Spend 1 Inspiration:** Gain **1 AP.**

abilities.name: The Ritual: Sacrifice Summon
abilities.description: **Sacrifice** a **Summon:** Gain **2 Focus.** *(You can't exceed the maximum in your Focus Pool.)*

abilities.name: The Hourglass
abilities.description:
Increases **Focus Pool.** (+1)

You gain an additional **Reaction** during each other character's turn. Use this **Reaction** only to perform a *Spell* Reaction.

abilities.name: Dilettante: Occultist
abilities.description: You gain the **Basic Ability** "The Art." *(You can never gain two abilities with the same name.)*

abilities.name: Conjure Blockade
abilities.description:
Conjure a **Blockade** in an adjacent empty tile. A **Blockade** has no Basic Actions. It can be used as cover, and is considered a destructible object only for the purposes of providing cover.

The **Blockade** has **Armor** equal to 3 plus your Tier.

**ATK:** 0 | **MAG:** 0 | **HP:** [tier]+6 | **Armor:** 3 | **DEF:** 11 | **SPD:** 0 | **FP:** 0

abilities.name: Conjure Legion
abilities.description:
Conjure a **Legion** in an adjacent empty tile. A **Legion** can perform *Basic* **Move, Attack,** and **Evade** using your AP.

**ATK:** Yours | **MAG:** Yours | **HP:** [tier]+4 | **Armor:** 0 | **DEF:** 11 | **SPD:** 4 | **FP:** 0

abilities.name: The Talisman
abilities.description:
**1/Turn — Condition:** An allied character adjacent to your **Summon** makes an **Attack Roll** or **Resistance Roll.**

**Effect:** The allied character gains **+1 Advantage** on the **Attack Roll** or **Resistance Roll.**

abilities.name: Summon Attack of Opportunity
abilities.description:
**1/Turn — Condition:** A hostile character within the **Range** of a **Melee Attack** action available to your **Summon** performs a **Movement Action.**

**Effect:** Your **Summon** uses that **Melee Attack Action** on the triggering character before the triggering **Action.** Each **Summon** can attack this way no more than **1/Round.**

abilities.name: Fortified Conjurations
abilities.description: Your **Summons** have **Max HP: +4.**

abilities.name: Conjure Dantalion
abilities.description:
Conjure **Dantalion** in an adjacent empty tile. **Dantalion** can perform *Basic* **Move, Attack,** and **Evade** using your AP.

**ATK:** Yours | **MAG:** 1d8 | **HP:** [tier]+4 | **Armor:** 0 | **DEF:** 10 | **SPD:** 3 | **FP:** 0

**Dantalion** is **Legendary** and has the **Tome** Reaction, which uses your Reaction. *(You can't control more than one Legendary Summon.)*

abilities.name: Dantalion: The Tome
abilities.description:
**1/Round — Condition:** An allied character other than the summoner attacks a hostile target within **Range 6** of **Dantalion** during their turn.

**Effect:** *Ranged Spell Attack* — **Range:** 6 | **DMG:** [mag]+[tier]

This attack targets the hostile target. It treats obstructions as cover as long as any unobstructed path to the target exists.

abilities.name: Conjure Paimon
abilities.description:
Conjure **Paimon** in an adjacent empty tile. **Paimon** can perform *Basic* **Move, Attack,** and **Evade** using your AP.

- **Paimon** is **Flying** and deals all damage as **Chaos Damage.**
- **Paimon's** movement doesn't trigger hostile **Reactions.**

**ATK:** 1 | **MAG:** 1 | **HP:** [tier]+5 | **DEF:** 10 | **SPD:** 3 | **FP:** 0

**Paimon** is **Legendary** and has the **Cure** Reaction, which uses your Reaction. *(You can't control more than one Legendary Summon.)*

abilities.name: Paimon: The Cure
abilities.description:
**Condition:** An allied character moves adjacent to or begins their turn adjacent to **Paimon.**

**Effect:** **Paimon** suffers **2 Chaos Damage.** The allied character clears up to one non-self-inflicted **Condition** and may become **Blessed** or gain **Barrier 2.** *(Their choice.)* This **Barrier** isn't lost as turns end.

abilities.name: The Concept
abilities.description: Recover one third of your maximum **Focus.**

abilities.name: The Boundary
abilities.description: **Beginning of Encounter:** Perform a *Summon Spell* **Action** as a **Free Reaction** before any character takes a turn. *(You still pay its costs.)*

abilities.name: The Curse
abilities.description: **On Attack:** At the beginning of your next turn — up to one **Summon** you control performs **The Curse** as a **Free Action (0ap)** with no **Focus Cost.**

abilities.name: The Pattern
abilities.description: Each **Summon** you control may perform a *Basic* **Action** that costs **1 AP** or less as a **Free Action.**

abilities.name: The Answer
abilities.description:
**Condition:** An allied character becomes the target of a hostile **Action.**

**Effect:** Switch the location of that allied character with your **Summon** within **Range 12** of that allied character. *(Each character Teleports to the other's location.)*

Your **Summon** becomes the new target of the hostile **Action.**

abilities.name: The Hunger
abilities.description:
**Sacrifice** a **Summon:** Allied characters adjacent to that **Summon** receive **Healing.** The total **Healing** is equal to the sacrificed **Summon's** remaining HP, divided as you choose among those characters.

**The Hunger** doesn't benefit from bonuses to your **Healing.**

abilities.name: The Plague
abilities.description:
**Condition:** A hostile character within **Range 8** is reduced to 0 HP.

**Effect — Focus Cost 2:** Summon a **Legion** *(as though you'd performed Conjure Legion)* in a tile adjacent to that character.

abilities.name: The Nightmare
abilities.description:
You can **Sacrifice 3 Summons** rather than pay this **Action's Focus Cost.**

Target a free tile. Characters in a **Size 1 Area** centered on that tile make a **Resistance Roll** or suffer [mag] Damage and are **Stunned +1.** Characters that **Resist** suffer half damage and aren't **Stunned.** The target tile is **Obstructed** until the end of the round.

At the end of the round, conjure **Nightmare** in that tile. **Nightmare** can perform *Basic* **Move, Attack,** and **Evade** using your AP. **Nightmare** can always perform all **Melee Actions** available to you, and has the **Pummel** and **The End** *Special* **Actions**. It uses your **Focus.** **Nightmare** is immune to involuntary movement.

**ATK:** 5 | **MAG:** 5 | **HP:** [tier]+10 | **Armor:** 2 | **DEF:** 10 | **SPD:** 2 | **FP:** 0

**Nightmare** is **Legendary.** *(You can't control more than one Legendary Summon.)*

abilities.name: Nightmare: Pummel
abilities.description: **Nightmare's** first **Melee Attack Action** each turn has **On Hit:** Target makes a **Resistance Roll** or suffers **Push 2** and **Dazed +1.** The character suffers **Push 1** on a **Resist.**

abilities.name: Nightmare: The End
abilities.description:
Perform **The End** only during your **Delayed Turn** and only with **Initiative.** *(Your first AP during that turn must be spent on The End.)*

**+1 Advantage.**

abilities.name: Certain Doom
abilities.description:
**1/Round:** Deal **[tier]+1 Piercing Chaos Damage** to up to one hostile character within **Range.**

This damage can't be prevented or resisted. It doesn't target the chosen character and ignores the effects of all abilities, statuses, and conditions. **Certain Doom** doesn't trigger **Reactions** and can never deal bonus damage or increased damage.

abilities.name: Oracle's Path
abilities.description:
**Beginning of Encounter:** Declare yourself or an allied character.

This encounter, when the declared character is the first allied character to be damaged by a hostile character: That character receives **1 Healing.** You gain **3 Focus** and begin your next turn with **+1 Turn AP.** Focus gained this way can exceed your maximum and is lost at the end of the encounter.

abilities.name: Skirmisher
abilities.description: You can move diagonally.

abilities.name: Ultimate: Omniscience
abilities.description: For the rest of the encounter: You have **Adjudicate.**

abilities.name: Adjudicate
abilities.description:
**1/Round — Condition:** An **Action Resolution** is rolled and a result is determined.

**Effect:** Change one of the **Action Resolution** dice to a **1** or **6,** possibly changing the outcome of the **Action Resolution.**

**Adjudicate** is a **Free Reaction.** Additionally, you can't be prevented from taking this **Reaction,** except for by its own **1/Round** limit. *(For example, you can use it while under the effects of harmful Conditions that prevent the use of Reactions. You can use it if you've already performed other Reactions this turn. You can use it while staggered, downed, unconscious, dead, unable to perform actions, or if you are somehow no longer present in the scene.)*

abilities.name: Time Manipulation
abilities.description: **1/Encounter — Spend 1 Inspiration:** Your next **Action** has **-1 AP Cost** *(min. 0).*

abilities.name: Haruspex
abilities.description: You have the **Haruspicy** Action.

abilities.name: Haruspex: Haruspicy
abilities.description: While adjacent to a hostile character with **0 HP:** Pay half your maximum HP as an additional cost. If you do, remove that character from play and increase the **Flow of Battle** by 1.

abilities.name: Limitless Willpower
abilities.description: If you would pay a **Focus** cost, you may instead **Spend 1 Inspiration.**

abilities.name: Foresight
abilities.description: **1/Quest, Spend 1 Inspiration:** For the rest of the encounter, you have **+1 Advantage** on all **Action Resolutions.**

abilities.name: True Sight
abilities.description: While performing **Actions,** ignore the effects of **Stealth** abilities and **Concealment.**

abilities.name: Reliable Attacks
abilities.description:
Your **Attack Actions** without **Graze** have **On Miss:** Graze 2.

*(Graze activates On Damage effects, but not On Hit effects.)*

abilities.name: Guidance
abilities.description: Your *Basic* **Aid** action has the following additional option, which can be selected instead of other options:

abilities.name: Read Intent
abilities.description: - The character you **Aid** becomes **Blessed.**

abilities.name: Disorient
abilities.description: Target hostile character makes a **Resistance Roll** or becomes **Off Guard** and is perpetually **Dazed** until they�re no longer **Off Guard**. Your Disorient can�t apply Off Guard to a character more than **1/Encounter**.

abilities.name: Manipulate Fate
abilities.description: An allied character in **Range** immediately performs a *Basic* **Move Action** as a **Free Reaction.**

abilities.name: Prepared Heal
abilities.description:
**Condition:** You or an allied character within **Range 5** suffer damage.

**Effect — Focus Cost 2:** The damaged character receives [mag] **Healing** after the damage is dealt. A character that **Delayed** this round receives an additional **2 Healing.**

abilities.name: Revelation
abilities.description: An allied character in **Range** clears **Blinded** and **Dazed.** That character ignores **Concealment** until the end of their next turn.

abilities.name: Future Sight
abilities.description: Choose a **Size 1 Area** in **Range.** At the beginning of your next turn, hostile characters in that **Area** suffer [mag] Damage. Allied characters in the area receive **2 Healing,** plus **1 Healing** for each hostile character in the area. If no characters are in the area, recover **Focus** spent to perform **Future Sight.**

abilities.name: Misleading Vision
abilities.description: Target hostile character within **Range** makes a **Resistance Roll** or immediately performs a *Basic* **Move Action,** moving their full speed in a direction of your choice as a **Free Reaction.** *(This movement is voluntary, though you choose its direction.)*

abilities.name: Assurance
abilities.description:
Bind to an **Attack Action.** *(When you begin an encounter, choose an option from those available to you to bind this ability to.)*

The **Bound Attack** can't have net **Advantage** or **Disadvantage** and treats its target's **DEF** as 9.

abilities.name: Conceal Reality
abilities.description:
Choose a **Size 1 Area** in **Range.**

Until the end of your next turn: Characters in that area have **Concealment 3.**

**Sustain (2ap):** Move the area **2 tiles** in any direction.

abilities.name: Entelechy
abilities.description:
**Flurry**

**On Damage:** Another allied character within **Range** receives **Barrier** equal to the total **Damage** dealt.

**On Miss:** Graze 2. *(Applies On Damage effect.)*

abilities.name: Telepathic Bond
abilities.description:
**Condition:** An allied character within **Range** performs the **Refocus Action.**

**Effect — Focus Cost 3:** That character recovers **1 AP** and receives [mag] **Barrier.** It isn't lost as turns end this turn.

abilities.name: Grasp the Future
abilities.description:
An allied character within **Range** that isn't **Delaying** and hasn't taken a turn this round immediately takes their turn. You can't perform **Reactions** during that turn.

Once that character's turn ends, your turn resumes if you have **Turn AP** remaining.

abilities.name: Rewind
abilities.description:
**Condition:** An allied character performs a non-Ultimate **Action,** and all other **Reactions** to that **Action** *(if any)* have been declared.

**Effect:** Undo the triggering **Action.** The triggering **Action** can't be performed again this turn. Any declared **Reactions** can't be performed again this turn.

*(When you Undo an Action, all effects of that Action, including damage and healing, are reversed, and any statuses and conditions inflicted by that Action are cleared. The triggering Action is treated as though it never occurred. The costs of the triggering Action, including AP, Reactions, Focus, Inspiration, and the Flow of Battle are refunded.)*

abilities.name: Life Essence
abilities.description: When a character receives **Healing** from you, that character gains **Regeneration 1.**

abilities.name: Presence of Mind
abilities.description:
Perform **Presence of Mind** only as your first **Action** during your turn. *(You keep the Initiative as long as no AP is spent.)*

Gain **1 AP.** Spend it only on a *Spell* **Action.**

abilities.name: Supreme Resolve
abilities.description: The *Basic* **Refocus Action** restores 1/2 of your maximum **Focus.** *(Instead of 1/3.)*

abilities.name: Ultimate: Breath of Life
abilities.description:
Perform **Breath of Life** only with **Initiative.** Choose a **Size 3 Area** centered on you.

- For each allied character: if that character is **Downed,** they recover **1 Vigor** and **1 HP** and are returned to play in a free tile in the chosen area. If the character is in the chosen area and isn't **Downed,** that character clears up to one **Condition** of their choice and receives **Regeneration 3.**
- For each hostile character in the area, that character makes a **Resistance Roll** or is **Stunned +2.** A character that **Resists** is **Stunned 1.**

*(An Action is performed with Initiative if it's the first Action you spend AP on during your turn.)*

abilities.name: Resurrection
abilities.description: **1/Quest, Spend 1 Inspiration:** End your turn. A **Downed** allied character recovers **1 HP,** removes **Wounded,** is returned to play in a free tile within **Range,** and immediately takes an extra turn. They are **Invulnerable** during this turn.

abilities.name: Supreme Abeyance
abilities.description:
Your **Abeyance** gains the following additional **Condition:**

- **Condition:** An allied character within **Range 3** is dealt non-**Chaos** damage by a hostile character.

If **Abeyance** is used to prevent damage dealt to another character, the **Poison** is inflicted on that character.

abilities.name: Divine Intervention
abilities.description:
**Condition:** You apply **Healing** to another character while that character is at or below half their maximum HP.

**Effect — Focus Cost 1:** That character receives **Damage Resistance** until the end of their next turn.

abilities.name: Surecast
abilities.description: You can't be moved involuntarily if you're **Regenerating.**

abilities.name: Admonishment
abilities.description: Each round, the first character that fails a **Resistance Roll** you force is **Stunned 1.**

abilities.name: Purifying Focus
abilities.description: When you **Refocus,** you or up to one adjacent allied character clear a **Condition** of your choice that wasn't self-inflicted.

abilities.name: Alleviating Aid
abilities.description: When performing **Aid,** the allied character receives **Regeneration 2.**

abilities.name: Bane
abilities.description: **On Hit:** The target makes a **Resistance Roll** or is **Poisoned** [tier]+2.

abilities.name: Abeyance
abilities.description:
**Condition:** You're dealt non-**Chaos** damage by a hostile character.

**Effect — Focus Cost 2:** Prevent that damage. You're **Poisoned** x, where x is the amount of damage prevented.

abilities.name: Tranquilize
abilities.description:
Up to one hostile character in **Range** becomes **Off Guard.** That character makes a **Resistance Roll** or is perpetually **Dazed** until it suffers nonzero damage from any source. A character that **Resists** is **Dazed 1.**

You can't choose the same character with **Tranquilize** more than once in an encounter.

abilities.name: Soothe
abilities.description:
Perform **Soothe** only with **Initiative.**

You or up to one allied character within **Range** receive [mag] **Healing.**

abilities.name: Succor
abilities.description: You or up to one allied character in **Range** receives **Regeneration 3.** When performed with **Initiative,** **Succor** confers **Regeneration 4** instead.

abilities.name: Rebuke
abilities.description: Up to one hostile character in **Range** makes a **Resistance Roll** or is **Stunned 1.** If **Rebuke** was performed with **Initiative,** that character is instead **Stunned 2,** becoming **Stunned 1** on a **Resist.**

abilities.name: Greater Cure
abilities.description:
You or up to one allied character in **Range** receives [tier]+5 **Healing.** Additionally:

- When performed with **Initiative,** **Greater Cure** confers **3 additional Healing** and **Regeneration +1.**
- During a **Delayed Turn,** **Greater Cure** confers **3 additional Healing** and **Regeneration +1.**

abilities.name: Greater Restoration
abilities.description:
Perform **Greater Restoration** only with **Initiative.**

You or up to one allied character in **Range** clear a **Condition** of your choice that wasn't self-inflicted.

abilities.name: Panacea
abilities.description: You and non-**Downed** allied characters in a **Size 2 Area** centered on you receive **3 Healing.** If **Panacea** was performed with **Initiative,** **Panacea** instead confers [mag]+3 **Healing.**

abilities.name: Harmonize
abilities.description: When you perform a *Spell* **Action,** **Teleport 1.** This movement doesn't trigger **Reactions** and can be made either before or after the **Spell Action's** effects take place.

abilities.name: Lucid Dreaming
abilities.description:
Perform **Lucid Dreaming** only with **Initiative.**

At the start of your next turn, recover **7 Focus.**

abilities.name: Benediction
abilities.description: You or up to one non-**Downed** allied character in **Range** receives x **Healing,** where x is the chosen character's **Maximum HP.** If **Benediction** was performed with **Initiative,** the chosen character has **Damage Resistance** until the start of their next turn.

abilities.name: Condemn
abilities.description:
Perform **Condemn** only with **Initiative.**

Target hostile character that isn't **Elite** or **Legendary** is **Stunned 3.** *(No roll.)*

You can't target the same character with **Condemn** more than **1/Encounter**.

abilities.name: Duet Stance
abilities.description:
**As you enter Duet Stance:** Up to one allied character of your choice becomes your **Foil.**
- **In Duet Stance, End of Turn:** If you spent 3 or more **Focus** on **Focus Costs** this turn, your **Foil** recovers **Focus** equal to **1/3** of the **Focus** you spent on **Focus Costs** this turn.
- When you **Refocus,** you may choose a new **Foil.** The chosen character must be within your **line of effect.**
- You have the **Rite of Inspiration** *Special* **Action**.

abilities.name: Duet Stance: Rite of Inspiration
abilities.description: Your **Foil** may perform a non-*Ultimate* **Action** that costs (1 AP) or less as a **Free Reaction.**

abilities.name: En Avant
abilities.description:
*Movement* **Focus Cost -1**. *(min. 1)*

Your *Basic* **Evade Action** is **Move** 2.

Incoming **falling damage** is reduced to 1.

abilities.name: Last Dance
abilities.description:
**Flurry**

All hostile characters in **Range** become targets.

**On Attack**: Any number of target non-Downed allied characters within **Range** become **Blessed**, gain **Barrier 3**, and have **+1 Turn AP** next turn.

abilities.name: En Passant
abilities.description:
**Start of Turn:** Choose one.
- **Fly 1**.
- **1/Encounter, Spend 1 Inspiration: Fly** 3.

abilities.name: Fortune's Favor
abilities.description:
**Condition:** An Attack Roll targets you, or you make a **Resistance Roll**.

**Effect - Spend 1 Inspiration**: **Gamble** ***x***, where ***x*** is a number of your choice (1-5). If you win, reduce the result of **Attack Roll** or increase the result of the **Resistance Roll** by ***x***.

abilities.name: After You
abilities.description:
**"After You!"** can't be **Bound**.

Perform **"After You!"** only while within **Range 3** of a hostile character that hasn't acted during the current round and isn't **Stunned**.

Perform the *Basic* **Refocus Action** as part of this **Action**. You become **Blessed**, gain **Barrier 3**, and have **+1 Turn AP** next turn.

abilities.name: Misdirection
abilities.description:
Hostile characters have **+1 Disadvantage** on the **Resistance Roll** against your Feint.

When an attack against a character you performed **Feint** on this turn consumes **Off Guard**: The target becomes **Off Guard**.

abilities.name: Technical Step
abilities.description: While in Duet Stance: You may perform **Rite of Inspiration** as though it had "**1/Round, Spend 1 Inspiration**" instead of **1/Encounter**.

abilities.name: Feint
abilities.description: The target makes a **Resistance Roll** or becomes **Off Guard**.

abilities.name: Dash
abilities.description: **Move** up to **Speed**+2. You become **Off Guard**.

abilities.name: Inspiring Strike
abilities.description: **On Attack**: Up to one allied character within *Range* becomes **Blessed**.

abilities.name: Performance
abilities.description: When you **Refocus**, up to one allied character within *Range* becomes **Blessed**.

abilities.name: Cascade
abilities.description:
- **Flurry**
- **On Hit**: The target is Dazed +1.

abilities.name: Flair
abilities.description:
**Bind** to a *Melee Attack* **Action**.
- The Bound Action is a *Movement* **Action**.
- You may **Fly** 1 as you perform the **Bound Action**. *(You can target a character outside the Action's Range if this movement brings you into Range.)*

abilities.name: Silhouette
abilities.description:
**Silhouette** doesn't trigger **Reactions**.
- **Condition: An adjacent character performs a *Movement* **Action**.
- **Effect (Focus Cost 2):** Perform the *Basic* **Evade Action** as part of this **Reaction**.

abilities.name: Closed Position
abilities.description:
Target a character. **Move** 2. The target mirrors your movement, ignoring restrictions on diagonal movement. Both movements are involuntary.
A hostile target makes a **Resistance Roll**. On a **Resist**, they aren't moved, and you may still **Move** 2, but your movement is voluntary and triggers **Reactions**.

abilities.name: Bravura
abilities.description:
- **Flurry**

- **On Hit:** The target is **Off Guard** and makes a **Resistance Roll** or becomes **Blinded** 3.

abilities.name: Flyby
abilities.description:
**Flurry**

You may **Move** 2 as you perform **Flyby**.

**On Hit**: **Move** 2. This movement doesn't trigger **Reactions**.

abilities.name: Syncopate
abilities.description:
**Start of Turn**: Choose and expend a tag that hasn't been chosen this encounter from among *Attack, Spell, Movement, and Support*.

If all tags have been chosen, instead, reset the expended choices. *(You don't make a choice this turn.)*

**This turn**, if the second Action Point you spend is used to perform an **Action** with the chosen tag, recover 1 Focus. If it isn't, reset the expended tag.

abilities.name: Falling Petals
abilities.description:
**Condition:** You finish performing an **Action** that inflicts **Dazed, Off Guard, or Blinded** on a hostile character.

**Effect** **(Focus Cost 3)**: Each hostile character within **Range** makes a **Resistance Roll** or suffers each **Condition** inflicted by the triggering **Action**.

abilities.name: Improvisation
abilities.description:
**Improvisation** can't be **Bound**.

Choose a *Special* **Improvisation** **Action** you haven't chosen this encounter, and perform that **Action** as a part of this **Action.**

On subsequent turns, you can **(1 AP)**: Repeat **Improvisation** with **Focus Cost:** 0. The effect continues until all *Special* **Improvisation** **Actions** have been chosen, or until you end a turn without performing this **Action**.

abilities.name: Improvisation: Devilry
abilities.description:
Perform only as a part of **Inspiration.**

**On Hit:** The target is **Blinded** 3.

abilities.name: Improvisation: Dazzlement
abilities.description:
Perform only as a part of **Inspiration.**

Each adjacent hostile character makes a ***Resistance Roll** or is **Stunned +1**.

abilities.name: Improvisation: Dynamics
abilities.description:
Perform only as a part of **Inspiration.**

**Fly** 3.

abilities.name: Improvisation: Dignity
abilities.description:
Perform only as a part of **Inspiration.**

You and up to one allied character within **Range** 3 each become **Blessed** and gain **Barrier** 3.

abilities.name: Curtain Call
abilities.description:
**Condition:** A turn ends.

**Effect (Focus Cost 3):** Up to one hostile character within **Range** suffers **+1** to each incremental **Condition** that character suffered this turn. Then, that character makes a **Resistance Roll** with **+1 Disadvantage** or suffers ***x*** **Piercing Chaos Damage**, where ***x*** is half the total amount of damage that character suffered this turn.

abilities.name: Virtuoso
abilities.description:
**Bind** to an *Attack* **Action**.

The **Bound Action** deals half damage and no bonus damage, and has **AP Cost -1** *(min. 1)*.

abilities.name: Motes of Light
abilities.description:
**Beginning of Encounter**: Create three **Motes of Light**. *(They're d6s with values that begin at "1".)*
When you provide **Healing**, increase a **Mote of Light**'s value by the amount of **HP** the healed character gains.

abilities.name: Searing Ray
abilities.description:
**Flurry**

As an additional cost, choose a **Mote of Light** with a value above "1". The base damage is equal to **1** + that **Mote of Light's** value. That **Mote of Light's** value becomes "1". You may repeat the attack against the same target or different targets any number of times, until all **Motes of Light** have values of "1".

**Searing Ray** doesn't deal **Bonus Damage**, can't be **Bound**, and doesn't trigger **Reactions**.

abilities.name: Radiant Touch
abilities.description: Up to one allied character in **Range** receives **[mag]+1 Healing**.

abilities.name: Prominence
abilities.description:
Create a **New Sun**, then remove your **Motes of Light** from play. *(The New Sun is a d20 with a value that begins at "1" plus the current combined values of your Motes of Light.)*

While you have a **New Sun**:
- **Start of Turn:** You receive 2 **Healing**.
- You have **+1 Speed** and are **Flying**.
- **Healing** you provide can exceed a character's maximum **HP**. When you provide **Healing**, increase the **New Sun's** value by the amount of **HP** the healed character gained. *(Excess HP is lost at the end of the encounter.)*
- You can perform **Behold, The Glory of a New Sun!**

abilities.name: Prominence: Behold The Glory of a New Sun
abilities.description: Up to one hostile character in **Range** suffers **Piercing Damage** equal to the **New Sun's** value. That character and all adjacent characters are **Blinded 3**. Remove the **New Sun** from play and return your **Motes of Light** to play. *(Their values begin at "1". The hostile character isn't targeted; this action ignores cover and concealment as long as you can draw line of effect to the chosen character.)*

abilities.name: Celestial Blast
abilities.description:
- **Start of Encounter:** Create a **Mote of Light**. *(Per the Featherblade's "Motes of Light" Basic Ability. Its value begins at "1" and increases when you heal characters.)*
- The first time each turn you perform a *Spell Attack* **Action,** you may choose a **Mote of Light** with a value above 1. If you do, the spell deals bonus damage equal to the **Mote of Light's** value and the **Mote of Light** is turned to 1.

abilities.name: Higher, O Higher
abilities.description: When you perform **Rise Up Through The Night, Spend 1 Inspiration:** Instead of healing allied characters at the end of the movement, you heal each allied character you became adjacent to at any point during the movement. Characters healed this way clear **Prone** and are **Blessed**.

abilities.name: Fountain of Blood
abilities.description: When you create a **Fountain of Light, Spend 1 Inspiration:** Your **Fountain of Light** has three additional charges. You and allied characters adjacent to the **Fountain** can now use the **1/Turn Reaction** and consume a charge to gain **+1 Advantage** on an **Attack Roll** or deal **+1d6 Bonus Damage** on a successful attack.

abilities.name: Icarian Trip
abilities.description: Teleport up to one allied character to a free adjacent space of their choice.

abilities.name: Featherblade Stance
abilities.description:
Your **Attack Bonus** is increased by **1** and you have **Armor +1** *( max. 2 )* and an **Increased Focus Pool** (+3).

You can't perform more than one *Attack* **Action** in a round.

abilities.name: Sanctuary
abilities.description:
Perform **Sanctuary** only if it's your turn.

**Sanctuary** doesn't trigger hostile **Reactions.**

You can't be the target of attacks this turn.

abilities.name: Lightbound
abilities.description: If you cast a *Spell* this turn: Your *Movement* ignores Difficult Terrain.

abilities.name: Flash
abilities.description: Target hostile character makes a **Resistance Roll** or is **Blinded 2** until the end of their next turn.

abilities.name: Guiding Bolt
abilities.description:
**+1 Advantage**

**On Hit:** The target becomes **Off Guard.**

abilities.name: Cure Wounds
abilities.description: You or up to one allied character within **Range** receive [M]+2 **Healing.**

abilities.name: Retribution
abilities.description:
**Condition**: A hostile character hits you with a *non-Spell Attack.*

**Effect:** Choose one.
- Each adjacent hostile character makes a **Resistance Roll** or suffers **3 Damage** and becomes **Blinded 2** until the end of their next turn. A character that **Resists** suffers **Blinded 1**.
- You and adjacent allied characters receive 1 **Healing.**

abilities.name: Lightbomb
abilities.description:
Choose a **Size 1 Area** in **Range.**
- Up to one allied character in the area receives [M] **Healing.**

- Up to one hostile character in the area makes a **Resistance Roll** or suffers [M] **DMG** and becomes **Off Guard.** A character that **Resists** suffers half the damage and isn't **Off Guard.**

abilities.name: Sunlight Strike
abilities.description:
**Flurry**

**On Damage:** You or an adjacent allied character receives **Healing** equal to half the damage dealt. This **Healing** doesn't benefit from **Bonus Healing.**

abilities.name: Tactical Emergency
abilities.description:
**Condition:** An allied character takes damage.

**Effect:** Perform a *Basic* **Move Action** as part of this **Reaction.** This movement must move as close as possible to that character via the shortest available path.

abilities.name: Light of Life
abilities.description: When an allied character within your *Aura* begins their turn, that character receives 1 **Healing.** *(Your Aura is a Size 1 Area centered on you.)*

abilities.name: Sol Tenebris
abilities.description: Target hostile character makes a **Resistance Roll** or becomes **Blinded 6** until the end of their next turn. A character that fails the **Resistance Roll** can't be targeted by **Sol Tenebris** again this encounter.

abilities.name: Sunlight Blade
abilities.description:
**Bind** to a non-Spell *Attack* **Action**.

The **Bound** *Attack* has **1/Round,** **Focus Cost +1,** and **On Damage:** You or an adjacent allied character receives **Healing** equal to half the damage dealt. This **Healing** doesn't benefit from **Bonus Healing.**

abilities.name: Fountain of Light
abilities.description:
Create a **Fountain of Light**. It occupies a tile within **Range,** but does not obstruct that tile. It has three **Charges** and disappears when the last charge is consumed.

While adjacent to the **Fountain of Light,** you and allied characters have the **Ambrosia** Reaction.

abilities.name: Fountain of Light: Ambrosia
abilities.description:
**Condition:** You would be dealt damage or forced to make a **Resistance Roll.**

**Effect:** Consume a charge from the **Fountain.** You gain **+3 Barrier** before taking that damage or gain **+1 Advantage on the Resistance Roll.**

abilities.name: Wings of Hope
abilities.description: Until the start of your next turn, you are **Immobilized** and **Flying.** During this time, you also have **Damage Resistance** and the **Rise Up Through The Night** Reaction.

abilities.name: Rise Up Through The Night
abilities.description:
**Condition:** Your turn begins.

**Effect:** **Move 12**. **During this movement:** You are **Flying,** ignore **Reactions**, and can't change direction. **At the end of this movement,** you confer [mag] **Healing** to adjacent allied characters.

abilities.name: Scour
abilities.description:
**On Hit:** Adjacent hostile characters suffer half the damage dealt to the primary target. *(No roll.)*

Apply half the total damage dealt to all hostile characters by this spell as **Healing,** increased by bonuses to your **Healing** and divided as you choose among yourself and allied characters within **Range 4.** This **Healing** doesn't benefit from **Bonus Healing**.

abilities.name: Sentinel Stance
abilities.description: In **Sentinel Stance**, you may perform *Melee Weapon* **Actions** as though they had **Range 2** instead of any other **Range Profile**.

abilities.name: Thick of the Fight
abilities.description: While you're adjacent to a hostile character, *Ranged Attack* **Actions** treat you as though you have **cover**.

abilities.name: Brace
abilities.description:
Perform **Brace** only during your turn.

You have the **Spear Ready** **Reaction** until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Brace: Spear Ready
abilities.description:
- **Condition:** A hostile character ends a movement adjacent to you.

- **Effect:** Choose one; that character's *Attacks* have **+1 Disadvantage** against you this turn, **or**; perform a *Basic* **Attack Action** targeting that character.

abilities.name: Lance of Longinus
abilities.description:
**Lance of Longinus's Line 99 Range Profile** is drawn from any map edge, ignoring **line of effect**, though it must pass through you. All characters **within** or **adjacent to the line** become targets.

You and allied characters in the area aren't attacked. Instead, you gain **Barrier** [tier].

After attacking, each character that was successfully hit makes a **Resistance Roll** or chooses:
- That character is **Disarmed 1** and **Weakened 1**, or:
- That character is **Silenced 1** and **Vulnerable 1**.

abilities.name: Mimir's Eye
abilities.description: Your *Attacks* that consume **Off Guard** ignore **Cover** and **Concealment** against that character.

abilities.name: Dragoon Dive
abilities.description:
- When you **fly**, your next *Attack* **Action** this turn has **+1 Advantage**.
- When you take **falling damage**, reduce that **falling damage** to **1** and **fly 1**.
- As a **free action**, you can **spend 1 inspiration** to **fly 1**.

abilities.name: Hypervelocity
abilities.description: You have an additional **reaction** on each character's turn.

abilities.name: Great Cleave
abilities.description: When your *Melee* **Action** reduces a hostile character to **0 HP**, you may **Spend 1 Inspiration** to perform a *Melee* **Action** that costs (**2 AP**) or less as a **Reaction**.

abilities.name: Absolute Tyranny
abilities.description: If all hostile characters are within **Range** of your *Basic* **Attack Action**, increase the **Flow of Battle** by 1.

abilities.name: Rebalance
abilities.description:
**Condition:** You are dealt damage by a hostile character.

**Effect:** Move 1.

abilities.name: Lunging Attack
abilities.description:
**Lunging Attack** has **Range +1**.

**On Attack:** You become **Off Guard**.

abilities.name: Maneuvering Attack
abilities.description:
**Bind** to an *Attack* **Action**.
The **Bound** *Attack* has **Focus Cost +1** and **On Hit: Push 1**.

abilities.name: Rallying Motion
abilities.description: When you **Refocus**, you or up to one adjacent allied character clears **Slowed** or **Immobilized**.

abilities.name: Fangs Bared
abilities.description: You have the **Viper Strike** *Special Reaction* until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Fangs Bared: Viper Strike
abilities.description:
- **Condition:** A turn ends.
- **Effect:** Perform the *Basic* **Attack** **Action**.

abilities.name: Trip Attack
abilities.description: The **Bound** *Attack* deals half damage, deals no **Bonus Damage**, and has **On Hit:** The target makes a **Resistance Roll** or becomes **Prone**. A character that **Resists** can't become **Prone** this way this round.

abilities.name: Heavy Strike
abilities.description: **On Miss:** Graze 2+[tier]

abilities.name: Vault
abilities.description:
**Fly** up to your **Speed**.

At the end of this *Movement*: Adjacent hostile characters make a **Resistance Roll** or are **Dazed** +1.

abilities.name: Outmaneuver
abilities.description: When you deal damage to a character, until end of turn, you can move through that character and that character's attacks have **+1 Disadvantage** against you.

abilities.name: Backswing Cut
abilities.description:
- **Backswing Cut** deals no **Bonus Damage**.
- **On Hit:** The target is **Dazed 1**.
- ***Passive***: Your other *Melee Weapon* **Actions** that cost (**2 AP**) or less have **On Hit:** As a part of this **Action**, you may perform **Backswing Cut** on your target as a **Reaction**. *( You still pay its Focus Cost and obey its 1/Round limit. )*

abilities.name: Outnumbered
abilities.description: **End of Turn:** If two or more hostile characters are within **Range** of your *Basic* **Attack Action**, recover **2 Focus**.

abilities.name: Extended Threat
abilities.description:
- **Condition:** A hostile character affects you with **Involuntary Movement**.
- **Effect:** Your next *Melee Attack* **Action** has **Range +1**. *( This effect doesn't stack. )*

abilities.name: Giant Sweep
abilities.description:
Any number of hostile characters in **Range** become targets, though each target must be adjacent to at least one other target.

Each target takes [tier] damage and makes a **Resistance Roll** or becomes **Prone** and suffers **Push 1**.

abilities.name: Run Through
abilities.description: If **Run Through** targets two characters or a character and a **destructible**, it has **On Hit:** The target makes a **Resistance Roll** or is **Immobilized 1**.

abilities.name: Absolute Authority
abilities.description:
- **Condition:** A hostile character within the **Range** of your *Basic* **Attack Action** clears **Prone** or performs **Refocus**.
- **Effect:** Perform your *Basic* **Attack Action** on the triggering character as part of this **Reaction.**

classes.name: Deck of Towers: Generic Abilities
classes.description: When gaining a level in a Deck of Towers class, you can choose one of these abilities instead of a Class Ability as long as you meet the Rank requirements. It counts as an ability for the class you gained a level in.

classes.name: Paladin
classes.description: You should take levels in this class if: you enjoy a defensive playstyle that resists damage, your character relies on a shield in combat, or your character plays the role of a holy warrior, commander, or protective bastion for their allies in battle.

classes.name: Warrior
classes.description: You should take levels in this class if: you enjoy using a wide variety of physical attacks and maneuvers, your character is a master of weapons, or your character is a soldier or brawler that knows their way around a fight.

classes.name: Avenger
classes.description: You should take levels in this class if: you enjoy living on the edge and using self-sacrifice to protect or destroy others, your character has a dark side or wants revenge, or your character is willing to do the things that others are afraid to.

classes.name: Deck of Blades: Generic Abilities
classes.description: When gaining a level in a Deck of Blades class, you can choose one of these abilities instead of a Class Ability as long as you meet the Rank requirements. It counts as an ability for the class you gained a level in.

classes.name: Blademaster
classes.description: You should take levels in this class if: you enjoy dealing damage in melee with versatility, your character fights with a single weapon or wields a renowned blade, or your character is a ronin or career warrior that makes an art of combat.

classes.name: Scoundrel
classes.description: You should take levels in this class if: you enjoy ability combos and assassinating targets at the right moment, your character is a knave or rogue, or your character is stealthy and makes use of invisibility or assassination along with weapons.

classes.name: Marksman
classes.description: You should take levels in this class if: you enjoy dealing damage from afar and setting traps or area denial, your character fights with a bow or gun, or your character is a ranger or sniper that uses the environment and small details to their advantage.

classes.name: Arcanimist
classes.description: You should take levels in this class if: from the deepest pit of the seven hells to the very pinnacle of the heavens, the world will tremble!

classes.name: Tactician
classes.description: You should take levels in this class if: you want a supportive playstyle that combines magic and melee, your character is a noble sort, scholarly, or researches enemy weaknesses, or your character brings a book into battle.

classes.name: Deck of Magi: Generic Abilities
classes.description: When gaining a level in a Deck of Magi class, you can choose one of these abilities instead of a Class Ability as long as you meet the Rank requirements. It counts as an ability for the class you gained a level in.

classes.name: Deck of Glyphs: Generic Abilities
classes.description: When gaining a level in a Deck of Glyphs class, you can choose one of these abilities instead of a Class Ability as long as you meet the Rank requirements. It counts as an ability for the class you gained a level in.

classes.name: Occultist
classes.description: You should take levels in this class if: you like controlling the battlefield with one or more summoned creatures, or if your character creates or conjures aid to support themselves and others in combat.

classes.name: Mender
classes.description: You should take levels in this class if: you want to heal allies directly with powerful, singular spells, you want to support while planning your actions in advance, or your character is inspired by the clerics and healing magi of fantasy fare.

classes.name: Seer
classes.description: You should take levels in this class if: you knew I was going to say this!

classes.name: Transmuter
classes.description: You should take levels in this class if: you enjoy controlling the battlefield and changing or making use of terrain, or if your character is capable of manipulating the elements and the natural environment with science or magic.

classes.name: Heroic Abilities: All Classes
classes.description: Whenever a Heroic Talent becomes available, you may choose one from the following list instead.

classes.name: Masquerade
classes.description: You should take levels in this class if: your character is an agile battledancer, performing artist, or braggart; or you prefer to inflict disruptive statuses, synergize with allies, and evade attacks rather than generate pure damage.

classes.name: Lightbearer
classes.description: You should take levels in this class if: you want to support allies with direct healing without losing tempo in battle, you aren't afraid to get close to the enemy, or your character is a battle cleric, wields light, or is inspired by angels or Valkyrie.

classes.name: Warden
classes.description: You should take levels in this class if: your character fights with a spear, glaive, or lance, and holds enemies at bay with controlling effects and repositioning rather than dealing pure damage.
